# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

Prevent XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.
# Category: xxe

function load_xml_config($config_str) {
    $options = LIBXML_NOERROR | LIBXML_NOWARNING;
    $xml = simplexml_load_string($config_str, 'SimpleXMLElement', $options);
    if ($xml === false) {
        throw new Exception('Error parsing XML: ' . libxml_get_last_error()->message);
    }
    return $xml;
}

function extract_settings($xml) {
    $settings = array();
    foreach ($xml->xpath('//setting') as $setting) {
        $key = (string)$setting['name'];
        $value = (string)$setting;
        $settings[$key] = $value;
    }
    return $settings;
}

function load_xml_config_file($file_path) {
    try {
        $config_str = file_get_contents($file_path);
        if ($config_str === false) {
            throw new Exception('Error reading file');
        }
        return load_xml_config($config_str);
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        // Handle error
    }
}
